sql_array: CREATE TABLE xml_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, content XML, param_name VARCHAR(255), param_value VARCHAR(255));
CREATE TABLE other_data (other_id INT PRIMARY KEY, value INT);
SELECT id, http_value(xslt(sheet, xtree_doc(content), vector('chapter', (SELECT value FROM other_data WHERE other_id NOT IN (1, 2))))) FROM xml_data WHERE param_name IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, (CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM xml_data) NOT IN (SELECT other_id FROM other_data) THEN 'No matching other_id' ELSE 'Match Found' END) AS match_status FROM xml_data;
SELECT value FROM other_data WHERE NOT(value NOT IN (SELECT param_value FROM xml_data));
CREATE TABLE edge_cases (case_id INT PRIMARY KEY, test_value VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'test');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM edge_cases WHERE test_value NOT IN (SELECT param_value FROM xml_data WHERE param_value IS NULL);
